description_long: This is a stylized doll with a large, angular head of bright purple hair that extends down past the shoulders in jagged, layered sections. The doll has a pale face with large, round eyes, a small mouth, and a subtle, neutral expression. It wears a short-sleeved, collared shirt with a white front, gray shoulders, and blue and red buttons, paired with a flared blue skirt. The arms are outstretched horizontally, and the hands and legs are simplified, with minimal detail. On the back, a prominent pink bow is visible at the waist, adding a playful accent to the outfit. The overall appearance is cartoonish and chibi-inspired, with exaggerated proportions and smooth, simple surfaces.
description: A chibi-style doll with bright purple hair, a white and gray collared shirt, blue skirt, and a pink bow at the back. The doll has a large head, outstretched arms, and a playful, cartoonish appearance.
description_view_0: Front view showing the doll's face, purple hair, collared shirt with colored buttons, and blue skirt.
description_view_1: Left rear angle highlighting the layered purple hair and the side of the blue skirt.
description_view_2: Back view displaying the full extent of the purple hair and the prominent pink bow at the waist.
description_view_3: Right rear angle showing the hair's jagged layers and the side of the skirt and bow.
attribute_clothing_style: The doll is dressed in a short-sleeved, collared shirt with a white front panel, gray shoulders, and blue and red buttons, paired with a flared blue skirt and a large pink bow at the back. The style is reminiscent of Japanese school uniforms (seifuku) with a playful, cartoonish twist.
attribute_pose: The doll stands upright with both arms extended horizontally to the sides in a T-pose, legs straight and slightly apart, head facing forward, and torso upright.
attribute_facial_expression: The doll has a neutral facial expression with a small, closed mouth and wide, round eyes, giving a calm and expressionless appearance.
attribute_hair_style: The doll has long, straight, bright purple hair with jagged, layered ends that extend past the shoulders and frame the face.
